location: Weeping Peninsula — sold by the Nomadic Merchant stationed at Castle Morne Rampart for 1,500 runes
tactics: The merchant sits right at the Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace, easy to reach early via the Weeping Peninsula
Bring 1,500 runes; the same merchant also sells the bolts you'll need to actually fire it
lore: A simple crossbow built from a bow fixed to a stock — reliable and easy to use, if slow to reload.

builds.name: Budget early-game ranged option
builds.why: Cheapest and lightest crossbow to acquire, a solid low-investment secondary ranged tool early in a run
